scores.notes: The response describes the code but does not actually include it (no code blocks shown), so completeness is partial per scoring instructions. The described approach uses install+config_changed events rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent pattern, which the gold standard notes as less idiomatic but still valid. All described APIs (WaitingStatus, ActiveStatus, install/config_changed events) are real and correctly used. Cannot fully verify runs_correctly without seeing actual code.
